headlines.description: — The Jacksonville Jaguars have a championship pedigree at coach and quarterback.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jags end 20-game skid with 53-yard FG to beat Dolphins 23-20

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers didn't need to say it. He couldn't resist.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers throws 2 TDs, runs for 1 as Packers beat Bears 24-14

headlines.description: Joe Burrow was able to rest his voice on the road with a rout, quieting frustrated fans at Ford Field, a week after getting sent to the hospital after taking a hit to the throat.
headlines.shortLinkText: Joe Burrow throws 3 TDs as Bengals rout winless Lions 34-11

headlines.description: — The Indianapolis Colts finally figured out how to deliver a knockout punch Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Indianapolis gets in sync with 31-3 victory over Houston

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Sean McVay wasn't happy walking into the postgame news conference after his Los Angeles Rams had their way with the banged-up and struggling New York Giants.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford throws 4 TDs, D forces 4 TOs, Rams rout Giants

headlines.description: — Teammates approached Patrick Mahomes after his second interception in the first half and maybe the worst of his NFL career. They told him to keep being himself.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes, Chiefs bounce back to beat Washington 31-13

headlines.description: — So much for the Minnesota Vikings' second-half scoring woes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cousins throws TD pass in OT; Vikings beat Panthers 34-28

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Baltimore Ravens

headlines.description: — This Baltimore victory ended with the backup quarterback taking a knee.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ravens shut down Herbert, Chargers in 34-6 victory

headlines.description: — As loud music blasted inside Arizona's locker room, players danced and could be heard shouting “undefeated” while coach Kliff Kingsbury smiled at the wild scene via a FaceTime call from home.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray throws 4 TD passes, unbeaten Cardinals batter Browns

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Denver Broncos
Dallas Cowboys at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott wasn't going to let anything prevent him from enjoying the moment.
headlines.shortLinkText: Prescott TD pass lifts Cowboys to 35-29 OT win over Pats

headlines.description: — Pittsburgh Steelers coach Mike Tomlin insists there is nothing “mystical” to the way outside linebacker T.J. Watt goes about his business.
headlines.shortLinkText: Watt forces fumble in overtime, Steelers edge Seahawks 23-20
